article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.10. CC - Housekeeping Services BAH Program 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $193,000 contract extension for seniors' housekeeping program
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on extending a contract with Comfort Keepers to continue light housekeeping services for seniors under the Better at Home Program through December 31, 2026. The $193,000 extension is fully funded by a BC government grant administered through United Way, plus fees from participating seniors.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision if you provide home support or senior care services in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Better at Home housekeeping contract extension end date — Burnaby
